speed.title: Playback Speed
speed.pitchSyncTip: Keep original pitch when changing speed

autoClose.title: Sleep Timer
autoClose.waitSongEnd: Wait for current song to finish
autoClose.waitSongEndTip: When time is up, finish the current track before stopping

abLoop.title: A-B Loop
abLoop.enableTip: Set both A and B points, with B greater than A
abLoop.warningBLessThanA: B must be later than A; loop disabled

subtitle.plain1: May good music keep you company today
subtitle.plain2: Put on your headphones and let the world quiet down
subtitle.plain3: Music's ready — pick a track to start
subtitle.streak: You've listened {days} days straight, keep it up
subtitle.favorites: You added {count} new favorites this week
subtitle.recent: What to play today? Pick up your {count} recently played

continue.empty: No play history yet — go listen to something

radar.title: Radar
radar.subtitle: Keeps recommending music for your taste

local.title: Randomly landed on “{song}”
local.subtitle: Random picks from your library · {count} tracks

login.qrTipWaiting: Open the Cloud Music app and scan the QR code
login.qrTipScanned: Scanned, please confirm in the app
login.autoFetchTip: This feature can't guarantee account safety — use it at your own discretion. If the official page goes blank or unresponsive, close it and try again.
login.cookieHint: Only the MUSIC_U field from your cookie is needed. e.g. MUSIC_U=xxxx;
login.logoutConfirmDesc: Sign out of the current account?

search.title: Search
search.emptyKeyword: Type a keyword to start searching
search.noResultsHint: Try another keyword or switch the source

streaming.hintDetail: Server credentials are encrypted by the OS and stored locally; nothing is uploaded

empty.addHint: Click the button at the top right to add one

server.name: Server name
server.deleteConfirm: Delete server "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

errors.urlInvalid: Please enter a valid URL (http:// or https://)

lyricOffset.title: Lyric Offset
lyricOffset.hint: Positive values advance lyrics, in milliseconds

delete.fileConfirmOne: Permanently delete "{title}" from disk? This cannot be undone
delete.fileConfirm: Permanently delete {count} files from disk? This cannot be undone

playlist.title: Playlist
playlist.clearConfirmContent: Are you sure you want to clear the entire playlist? This cannot be undone.

liked.title: Liked Songs

empty.local: No liked local songs yet — click the heart next to a song to add it

liked.needLogin: Sign in to view your online liked songs

toast.unsupported: This source does not support liking

cloud.title: My Cloud
cloud.empty: No songs in your cloud yet
cloud.needLogin: Sign in to view your cloud library
cloud.removeConfirmOne: Remove "{title}" from your cloud? This cannot be undone.
cloud.removeConfirm: Remove {count} songs from your cloud? This cannot be undone.

history.title: Play History
history.empty: No playback history yet — play something to get started
history.clearConfirmContent: Clear all play history? This cannot be undone.

daily.title: Daily Recommend
daily.needLogin: Sign in to see daily recommendations

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.empty: Nothing here yet — go explore and save something you like
favorites.notLogin: Sign in to see your favorites

library.title: Library
library.emptyHint: Add a music folder to get started
library.noLocalDataHint: Add songs to your library to see them aggregated here
library.foldersDescription: Songs are automatically synced when added or removed
library.removeFolderConfirm: Removing this directory will delete its songs from the library!

autoPlay.label: Auto Play
autoPlay.description: Automatically start playback after loading a track

fadeEnabled.label: Fade In/Out
fadeEnabled.description: Audio fade on play and pause

loudnessNormalization.label: Loudness Normalization
loudnessNormalization.description: Automatically balance volume levels between tracks

songLevel.label: Online Audio Quality
songLevel.description: Preferred quality for online tracks; the actual level depends on what your account supports

enableSpectrum.label: Enable Spectrum
enableSpectrum.description: Real-time spectrum analysis adds some CPU load — consider disabling on lower-power devices

spectrumBarWidth.label: Bar Width
spectrumBarWidth.description: Smaller values give thinner, denser bars

lyricSourcePreference.label: Lyric Source Preference
lyricSourcePreference.description: Platform priority when matching online lyrics

lyricSourceOrder.label: Source Order
lyricSourceOrder.hint: When using auto mode, sources are tried top-down; falls through to the next on miss

lyricFormatOrder.label: Lyric Format Priority
lyricFormatOrder.hint: Picks the highest-ranked when multiple formats are available — e.g. multiple external lyric files, or TTML upgrade

smartPreferOnline.label: Auto-Upgrade Lyric Format
smartPreferOnline.description: Fetch a higher-ranked format from other platforms when the current one is low

enableOnlineTTMLLyric.label: Enable Online TTML Lyrics
enableOnlineTTMLLyric.description: Fetch lyrics from AMLL TTML DB. Supports word-level timing, translation, and romanization.

amllDbServer.label: AMLL TTML DB Server
amllDbServer.description: Make sure the URL is correct, otherwise lyric fetch will fail
amllDbServer.warning: If you do not know what this does, please leave it as default
amllDbServer.hint: URL must be valid and contain the required placeholders
amllDbServer.placeholders: %p is the platform path, %s is the song ID

enableExcludeLyrics.label: Enable Lyric Exclusion
enableExcludeLyrics.description: Strip metadata lines (e.g. lyricist, composer, arranger, producer) from the head and tail of the lyrics

excludeLyricsRules.label: Custom Rules
excludeLyricsRules.description: Append keywords and regex patterns on top of the built-in defaults
excludeLyricsRules.hint: User rules are merged with the built-in defaults
excludeLyricsRules.keywordHint: Keyword filter — matches the content before the colon
excludeLyricsRules.regexHint: JavaScript regex — compiled with the case-insensitive flag

hotkeys.label: Hotkeys
hotkeys.description: Manage in-app and global keyboard shortcuts
hotkeys.globalEnabledHint: Fire even when the app is not focused. May conflict with the OS or other apps.
hotkeys.resetAllHint: Restore every action's shortcut to its default
hotkeys.confirmResetDesc: All shortcuts will be reset and any customizations will be overwritten!
hotkeys.crossScopeWith: Same as the in-app binding of "{action}"; will fire twice
hotkeys.osOccupied: Already taken by the OS or another app
hotkeys.osDuplicate: Already used by another global shortcut

autoCenterCover.label: Auto Center Cover
autoCenterCover.description: Center cover and hide lyric area when no lyrics available

adaptiveFontSize.label: Adaptive Font Size
adaptiveFontSize.description: Auto-adjust lyric font size based on window size

followCoverColor.label: Follow Cover Color
followCoverColor.description: Lyric color follows the current cover art

autoImmersive.label: Auto Immersive Mode
autoImmersive.description: Hide top/bottom bars and the cursor when the mouse is idle or leaves the window

enableEmphasizeEffect.label: Emphasize Effect
enableEmphasizeEffect.description: Scale and glow animation for long syllables

enableBlur.label: Line Blur
enableBlur.description: Gradually blur lines further from the active line

hidePassedLines.label: Hide Passed Lines
hidePassedLines.description: Auto-hide lyrics lines that have been played

springPreset.label: Spring Preset
springPreset.description: Physics preset for lyric scroll spring animation

springMass.label: Mass
springMass.description: Higher values make motion sluggish with more inertia

springDamping.label: Damping
springDamping.description: Higher values decay oscillation faster, smoother motion

springStiffness.label: Stiffness
springStiffness.description: Higher values make spring snap back faster

alignPosition.label: Align Position
alignPosition.description: Vertical position of active line (0 = top, 1 = bottom)

wordFadeWidth.label: Fade Width
wordFadeWidth.description: Gradient width ratio for word highlight mask

desktopLyricEnabled.label: Enable Desktop Lyric
desktopLyricEnabled.description: Show a floating lyric window on desktop

desktopLyricShowTranslation.label: Show Translation
desktopLyricShowTranslation.description: Display translated lyrics on desktop lyric

desktopLyricDoubleLine.label: Double Line
desktopLyricDoubleLine.description: Show current and next line together

desktopLyricAutoGenerateWordByWord.label: Auto-generate Word Effect
desktopLyricAutoGenerateWordByWord.description: When off, only real per-word lyrics apply

desktopLyricStrokeColor.label: Stroke Color
desktopLyricStrokeColor.description: Outline color of lyric text; transparent means stroke is off

desktopLyricBackgroundMask.label: Text Background Mask
desktopLyricBackgroundMask.description: Add a translucent background block behind each lyric line for readability

desktopLyricBackgroundMaskColor.label: Mask Color
desktopLyricBackgroundMaskColor.description: Color and opacity of the text background mask

desktopLyricAlwaysShowSongInfo.label: Always Show Song Info
desktopLyricAlwaysShowSongInfo.description: Always show track title and artist; otherwise show only on hover

desktopLyricAnimation.label: Line Transition
desktopLyricAnimation.description: Enable slide-in / slide-out animation when lyric line switches

desktopLyricLimitBounds.label: Confine to Screen
desktopLyricLimitBounds.description: Clamp window position within the current display's work area while dragging

desktopLyricAlwaysOnTop.label: Always On Top
desktopLyricAlwaysOnTop.description: Keep desktop lyric window above others

dynamicIslandEnabled.label: Enable Dynamic Island
dynamicIslandEnabled.description: Show a compact floating lyric window at the top of the screen; drag it anywhere

dynamicIslandScale.label: Scale
dynamicIslandScale.description: Scale window height and font size together; 100% is the default size

dynamicIslandFontWeight.label: Font Weight
dynamicIslandFontWeight.description: Lyric text weight in the Dynamic Island

dynamicIslandDoubleLine.label: Always Two Lines
dynamicIslandDoubleLine.description: Keep two-line layout even when no translation is available

dynamicIslandShowTranslation.label: Show Translation
dynamicIslandShowTranslation.description: Show translation as the secondary line when available

dynamicIslandUnplayedColor.label: Unplayed Color
dynamicIslandUnplayedColor.description: Color of upcoming lyric text and artist name

dynamicIslandBackgroundColor.label: Background Color
dynamicIslandBackgroundColor.description: Background color and opacity of the island

dynamicIslandAlwaysOnTop.label: Always On Top
dynamicIslandAlwaysOnTop.description: Keep the Dynamic Island window above others

dynamicIslandSnapCentered.label: Center When Snapped
dynamicIslandSnapCentered.description: When off, snapping to the top keeps the dragged horizontal position

taskbarLyricEnabled.label: Enable Taskbar Lyric
taskbarLyricEnabled.description: Embed lyrics into the Windows taskbar

taskbarLyricPosition.label: Position
taskbarLyricPosition.description: Lyric position in the taskbar. Auto mode picks based on taskbar alignment

taskbarLyricAutoMaxWidth.label: Auto Width
taskbarLyricAutoMaxWidth.description: When enabled, fill the available taskbar space; otherwise limit to Max Width below

taskbarLyricMaxWidth.label: Max Width
taskbarLyricMaxWidth.description: Capped by available space to avoid squeezing

taskbarLyricColorMode.label: Color Mode
taskbarLyricColorMode.description: Text and background color scheme of the taskbar lyric

taskbarLyricShowCover.label: Show Cover
taskbarLyricShowCover.description: Show the current track's cover thumbnail beside the lyric

taskbarLyricDoubleLine.label: Double Line
taskbarLyricDoubleLine.description: Show current lyric together with translation or next line

taskbarLyricShowTranslation.label: Show Translation
taskbarLyricShowTranslation.description: In double-line mode, prefer translation; fall back to the next line when unavailable

playerBgType.label: Player Background
playerBgType.description: Background type of the full-screen player

themeSource.label: Theme Color Source
themeSource.description: How the theme color is determined

customColor.label: Custom Theme Color
customColor.description: Primary color used by the custom source

globalTint.label: Global Tint
globalTint.description: Apply theme color tint to the entire interface

appearanceStyle.label: Appearance Style
appearanceStyle.description: How the application background is rendered

backgroundImage.label: Background Image
backgroundImage.description: Pick a local image as the app background

backgroundBlur.label: Background Blur
backgroundBlur.description: Gaussian blur applied to the background image

backgroundDim.label: Dim Overlay
backgroundDim.description: Black overlay opacity for foreground readability

sidebarCollapsed.label: Collapse Sidebar
sidebarCollapsed.description: Collapse the sidebar to icon-only mode

sidebarPlaylistCover.label: Show Playlist Covers
sidebarPlaylistCover.description: Show playlist covers instead of default icons in the sidebar

showQualitySwitch.label: Show Quick Quality Switch
showQualitySwitch.description: Show the online audio quality tag in the player bar for quick switching

fontConfig.label: Font Settings
fontConfig.description: Configure fonts for the app, lyrics, and external lyric windows
fontConfig.title: Font Settings
fontConfig.modeHint: All fields below use this method

systemMediaControls.label: System Media Controls
systemMediaControls.description: Show playback info in system media controls

discordShowWhenPaused.label: Show When Paused
discordShowWhenPaused.description: Keep Discord status visible when paused

discordDisplayMode.label: Brief Status Display
discordDisplayMode.description: Text shown below username when detailed panel is not open
discordDisplayMode.name: App Name

rememberWindowState.label: Remember Window State
rememberWindowState.description: Restore window size, position and maximized state on next launch

taskbarProgress.label: Taskbar Progress
taskbarProgress.description: Show playback progress on the taskbar icon

streamingEnabled.label: Enable streaming
streamingEnabled.description: When disabled, the streaming entry is hidden from the sidebar

externalApiEnabled.label: Allow external control
externalApiEnabled.description: Let external apps control the player via the API

externalApiWs.label: Enable WebSocket
externalApiWs.description: External apps can subscribe to events and send commands

externalApiPort.label: Listen port
externalApiPort.description: TCP port for the external API (1024–65535)

externalApi.portInUse: Port {port} is already in use, pick another

closeAction.label: Close Button Action
closeAction.description: What to do when the title bar close button is clicked

rememberCloseChoice.label: Remember Close Choice
rememberCloseChoice.description: When off, asks every time the close button is clicked

closeDialog.title: Close Window
closeDialog.description: Choose what to do this time
closeDialog.remember: Remember my choice, don't ask again

storageManager.label: Data Management
storageManager.description: Backup, restore, reset settings, or clear all data

backup.label: Backup Settings
backup.description: Export current settings to a backup file

restore.label: Restore Settings
restore.description: Import settings from a backup file. Current settings will be overwritten.
restore.confirmDesc: Your current settings will be overwritten by the backup file, and the app will relaunch immediately to apply them. Local library, playlists and playback history are not affected.

resetSettings.label: Reset Settings
resetSettings.description: Restore all settings to defaults. Playlists and local library are not affected.
resetSettings.confirmDesc: All settings will be restored to their defaults. This cannot be undone.

resetAll.label: Clear All Data
resetAll.description: Wipe all playlists, sign-in state and caches, then reset settings
resetAll.confirmDesc: All playlists, sign-in state and caches will be wiped and settings reset. This cannot be undone.

plugins.hint: Install from local file or URL
plugins.hintDetail: Extend music capabilities with plugins, compatible with lx plugins
plugins.importUrlPlaceholder: Paste https:// link to a .js script
plugins.importUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid http or https URL
plugins.emptyHint: Install a plugin from local file or URL to enable extended features
plugins.uninstallConfirm: Are you sure you want to uninstall "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

pluginManager.label: Plugin Manager
pluginManager.description: Import, enable, or uninstall extension scripts

enableLocalTTMLOverride.label: Local TTML Override
enableLocalTTMLOverride.description: Prefer a local .ttml file (when available) over online lyrics

fileCacheManager.label: Cache Manager
fileCacheManager.description: Inspect cache usage and clear it

dbCacheManager.label: Database Manager
dbCacheManager.description: Inspect database usage and clear it

cacheDir.label: Cache Directory
cacheDir.hint: Covers, artist avatars and backgrounds live under this folder. Switching wipes the old caches; the new location must be an empty folder.
cacheDir.notEmpty: The selected folder isn't empty. Please pick an empty folder.
cacheDir.switchConfirmDesc: Current cover / artist / background caches will be cleared before the switch, and the new location must be an empty folder. Database-backed lyric caches are unaffected.
cacheDir.resetConfirmDesc: Current file caches will be cleared before resetting.

enableSongCache.label: Song Cache
enableSongCache.description: Cache online tracks locally to improve loading speed

songCacheSizeLimit.label: Size Limit
songCacheSizeLimit.description: When the limit is reached, entries are evicted automatically; ∞ means unlimited

cacheCategoryClear.label: Clear
cacheCategoryClear.confirmDesc: All cached data in this category will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

fileClearAll.label: Clear File Caches
fileClearAll.description: Clear all caches. This cannot be undone.
fileClearAll.confirmDesc: All file caches above will be deleted and regenerated on next use. This cannot be undone.

dbClearAll.label: Clear Database Caches
dbClearAll.description: Wipe lyric and matching caches stored in the database. Your local library and account data are not affected.
dbClearAll.confirmDesc: All database caches above will be cleared. This cannot be undone.

errors.deviceHint: No audio output device detected. Please connect headphones or speakers and try again.
errors.FILE_NO_AUDIO_STREAM: No audio stream found in file
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Failed to reach audio source, check network or try another
errors.NETWORK_TIMEOUT: Audio source timed out, check network or try another
errors.NO_PLUGIN_AVAILABLE: No plugin available for this platform
